data.name: Hentai Hina
data.detailed_description:
Her name is Hina.

She’s beautiful, daring, and dangerously attractive. Her desires became her sentence — now she serves her time in a prison where the chains are puzzles and the guards are silent eyes watching her every move.

Hentai Hina is a puzzle where passion and intellect intertwine. Each level is a fragment of her story; every solved puzzle brings her one step closer to inner freedom.

You’re not just playing — you’re diving into a world where even in the darkness of a cell, the spark of desire to live, think, and feel still burns.

🔞 Game Features:
💋 30 levels of temptation — each revealing a new side of Hina, her looks, gestures, and desires.
💋 30 achievements — walk the path of passion and prove you can handle all her trials.
💋 Gallery — collect the hottest scenes and enjoy them anytime.

🎯 3 difficulty modes:
💋 Easy — a gentle introduction.
💋 Normal — more temptation.
💋 Hard — for those who love to savor the pleasure slowly.

Piece her story together, bit by bit, and discover that even behind bars, freedom can still feel intoxicating.

data.short_description: Hentai Hina — a puzzle game about a charming girl imprisoned for her irresistible allure. Solve challenges, unlock scenes, and experience the perfect blend of intellect and desire.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
